free_text: Elastic scattering of 217 MeV 3He particles.
The scattered particles were analysed with
the R=170 cm spectrometer and detected in the focal
plane by a 17 plastic-scintillator hodoscope,
covering a useful energy range of about 5 MeV, in
coincidence with a large plastic scintillator behind
the hodoscope to minimize the background. Other
particles were discriminated again by their energy loss
in the small plastic scintillator. Faraday cup.
Digitizing error
Digitizing error
The absolute cross sections are accurate to +-8%
for angle > 9 degr., and to +-15% for smaller angles.
